content: # Best AI Video Editors for YouTube in 2026 YouTubers need to create high-quality content quickly — and AI video editors make it possible! These tools will help you edit faster, add professional captions, and grow your channel. Let's explore! Check out our complete [[link:/category/Video|Video category]] for more tools! --- ## 1. [[link:/tools/51|VEED]] — Browser-Based Powerhouse 🎬 VEED is perfect for YouTube — edit in your browser, add auto-captions, and resize for all platforms instantly! ### Key YouTube Features - 🔤 **Auto-captions in 100+ languages** — accessibility & SEO boost - 📐 **One-click resizing** — YouTube Shorts, TikTok, Instagram in seconds - 🎨 **Professional templates** — thumbnails, intros, and more **Try VEED Free**: {{AFFILIATE_VEED}} --- ## 2. [[link:/tools/201|Pictory]] — Text-to-Video Magic ✨ Pictory turns scripts, blog posts, and even audio into polished YouTube videos with AI voiceovers and B-roll! ### Perfect for Content Creators - 📝➡️🎬 **Text-to-video** — repurpose content easily - 🎤 **AI voiceovers** — 100+ realistic voices - 🤖 **Auto B-roll** — adds relevant footage automatically **Try Pictory**: https://pictory.ai --- ## AI Video Editors Comparison for YouTube | Tool | Best For | Pricing | |------|----------|---------| | VEED | Quick edits, captions, resizing | Free + Paid | | Pictory | Text-to-video, repurposing | Free trial + Paid | Ready to create more content in less time? Try these tools and watch your channel grow! 🚀 --- For more insights, check out our guide: [[link:/blog/best-ai-video-generators-for-tiktok-2026|Best AI Video Generators for TikTok in 2026]] **Final CTA**: Start with VEED — it's the fastest way to add professional captions and edit YouTube videos! {{AFFILIATE_VEED}}
